title: Mildly Smoky Korean Chilli Noodles
description: A spicy and energizing Korean dish featuring hot chilli powder and a smoky flavor, made with low-calorie-friendly ingredients. This fermented, glassy-jelly noodle dish is perfect for those looking for a healthy and flavorful meal.

ingredients.name: noodles
ingredients.notes: preferably glass noodles or cellophane noodles

instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the Korean chilli powder, smoked paprika, and soy sauce to the pan and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Season the noodles with salt to taste.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and garnish with chopped green onions and toasted sesame seeds.
Serve the noodles hot and enjoy.
For an extra smoky flavor, add a few drops of liquid smoke to the noodles before serving.
